title: Dane Whitman
content:
{{CharHub|Dane Whitman|Dane Whitman}} {{Character |image = Black Knight Character Poster.jpg |real name = Dane Whitman |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|GRBR}}
{{Citizenship|ENG}} |gender = Male |title = Professor |DOB = October{{Ref|E}}{{Ref|MSTMCUAOT}} |affiliation = [[Natural History Museum]] |movie = ''[[Eternals (film)|Eternals]]'' |actor = [[Kit Harington]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|Why didn't you [[Eternals|guys]] help fight [[Thanos]]? Or any war? Or all the other terrible things throughout history?|Dane Whitman to [[Sersi]]|Eternals}} Professor '''Dane Whitman''' is a scientist and a historian at [[London]]'s [[Natural History Museum]], who is the heir of an ancient and mysterious family. Whitman started a romantic relationship with [[Sersi]], who turned out to be an [[Eternal]]. When he learned of the impending [[Emergence]], he was encouraged by Sersi to make amends with his uncle, leading him to investigate his family's history once more. Following Sersi's abduction from [[Earth]] by [[Arishem the Judge]], Whitman fell into the possession of the [[Ebony Blade]]. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====Issues with his Family==== Dane Whitman was born in [[England]] in the late 20th century to a family that owned a magical sword known as the [[Ebony Blade]] and, by Whitman's admission, had a complicated history. As a child, he wished to be a giraffe. Whitman had a falling out with his uncle, [[Nathan Garrett]], and the two became estranged.{{Ref|E}} ====Relationship with Sersi==== Whitman went to college and got a degree to become a teacher and historian. He then met [[Sersi]] and [[Sprite]], becoming close to the both of them. Whitman formed a romantic relationship with Sersi, but was often confused by Sprite, who kept saying weird things. In [[2018]], Whitman survived the [[Snap]].{{Ref|E}} ===[[Emergence|The Emergence]]=== ====Teaching Sersi's Students==== [[File:DaneTeaches2.png|{{AltFloat}}|Whitman teaches [[Sersi]]'s class]] In [[2024]], following the [[Blip]], Whitman worked at the [[Natural History Museum]]. One day, [[Sersi]] was late for her class, so Whitman was forced to substitute for her. Whitman rambled on about what he believed was supposed to be taught until Sersi finally arrived. Whitman announced that she was there before whispering to her how the kids scare him. She thanked him, saying that they would see each other that night. A student then teased them for that comment.{{Ref|E}} ====Discussion with Sprite==== [[File:Eternals deleted scene - Dane and Sprite.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Whitman talking to [[Sprite]]]] Whitman then walked to the gallery, saying hello to [[Terry (British Museum)|Terry]]. He then saw [[Sprite]] and told her that [[Sersi]] was teaching. Sprite started claiming stuff about the fossils. She called a smilodon head a [[Deviant]] as well as claiming that they did not get [[Thena]]'s likeness right in her sculpture. Whitman corrected her, saying it was "[[Athena|A-thena]]," but Sprite still claimed there was no A. Sprite said that Thena's spear was made of cosmic energy, so Whitman teased her asking what Sprite's power was. Sprite casually claimed she could make illusion before talking about concepts like stories and illusions, saying she taught everyone stories. Whitman applauded Sprite for her knowledge, and she said she was older than he thought. Sprite then brought up how Whitman asked Sersi to move in with him. She then said that Sersi was not over her [[Ikaris|ex-boyfriend]] despite breaking up with him a century ago and he could fly. Whitman assured Sprite that he would not take Sersi away from her. Suddenly, there was an earthquake.{{Ref|EDS}} ====Drinks with Sersi==== [[File:DaneBirthdayCake.png|{{AltFloat}}|Whitman and [[Sersi]] celebrate his birthday]] {{Quote|Look, if you don't want to move in with me, you could just say."
"Dane, this is serious."
"I know. I'm just still getting over the fact you're not a wizard.|Dane Whitman and [[Sersi]]|Eternals (film)}} That night, Whitman and [[Sersi]] met up to celebrate his birthday at a bar. He received a ring with his family's crest from Sersi, commenting on how expensive it must have been. He also offered for Sersi to move in with him; however, she declined his offer. He then revealed the weird things [[Sprite]] said to him while she was not around, leading him to finally confront Sersi on whether or not she was like [[Doctor Strange]], which Sersi laughed at.{{Ref|E}} ====Deviants' Return==== [[File:Black Knight, Sersi and Sprite.png|{{AltFloat}}|Whitman with [[Sersi]] and [[Sprite]]]] As Whitman, [[Sersi]], and [[Sprite]] were walking home, they were attacked by a [[Kro|Deviant]], with them originally running away from. Eventually, Whitman helped people get off the bridge as Sprite created illusions and Sersi changed the bus flying at them to petals, to which Whitman picked up and looked at in disbelief. [[Ikaris]] arrived just in time to save them. [[File:Sersi and Black Knight.png|{{AltFloat}}|Whitman questions [[Sersi]]]] After the Deviant left, Whitman awkwardly introduced himself to Ikaris, with him realizing that Ikaris was Sersi's ex. Afterwards, Whitman asked Sersi to explain everything about the [[Eternals]] to him. He questioned why they never interfered throughout history or more recently with [[Thanos]] and the [[Infinity War]].{{Ref|E}} ====Calling Sersi==== [[File:DaneCalls.png|{{AltFloat}}|Whitman calling [[Sersi]]]] Later, Whitman called [[Sersi]] via video call. However, the phone connection was not the best and so they were breaking up, which Sersi commented on with [[Ikaris]] making a happy comment on, thinking they were actually breaking up.{{Ref|E}} ====Reuniting with Sersi==== [[File:Eternals (film) 52.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Whitman watches [[Arishem the Judge]] arrive]] Later, Whitman was reunited with [[Sersi]] as she said goodbye to [[Kingo]] and [[Sprite]]. He and Sersi then went for a walk at [[Parliament Hill]] to talk about the recent events. He listened as Sersi talked about her inability to live like she was human. He also made her remember their vow to keep no more secrets with, as he struggled to tell her the truth about his family history which he had recently learned. However, when [[Arishem the Judge]] appeared in the sky, Whitman became frightened and watched in shock as Sersi was transported off of Earth.{{Ref|E}} ====Claiming the Ebony Blade==== [[File:DaneWhitmanListens.png|{{AltFloat}}|Dane Whitman listens to [[Blade]]]] Afterwards, Whitman set off to the museum to get ready to finally accept and wield the [[Ebony Blade]], stopping after hearing a [[Blade|voice]] asking him, if he's really ready for it.{{Ref|E}} ==Abilities== *'''Expert Scientist''': Whitman is a skilled historian and teacher, as he was seen briefly teaching the students in [[Sersi]]'s class. *'''Bilingualism''': Whitman is fluent in his native English, as well as Latin. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''[[Ebony Blade]]''': The Ebony Blade was passed down through generations of Whitman's family, and he came across the sword while investigating his family's history. He was about to use it, but stopped when [[Blade]] appeared. ===Other Equipment=== *'''Whitman Family Ring''': [[File:SersiGivesDanePresent.png|thumb|250px|[[Sersi]] gifting Whitman his ring]] Whitman was given a ring with his family's crest as a birthday gift from [[Sersi]]. ==Facilities== *'''[[Natural History Museum]]''': Whitman taught classes as the Natural History Museum, and covered for [[Sersi]] when she was late for work. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Nathan Garrett]] - Uncle ===Allies=== *[[Natural History Museum]] **[[Sersi]] - Girlfriend **[[Terry (British Museum)|Terry]] *[[Sprite]] - Friend *[[Ikaris]] † *[[Kingo]] *[[Blade|Eric Brooks/Blade]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Deviants]] **[[Kro]] † *[[Arishem the Judge]] {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Dane Whitman is the latest descendant in a long line of warriors possessing the mystical [[Ebony Blade]] and title of '''Black Knight'''. Whitman rode multiple winged horses and was the first owner of [[Warsong]], whom he gifted to [[Valkyrie]]. **There was also an alternate version of Black Knight who went by the name '''Proctor'''. Proctor met and fell in love with [[Sersi]], forming a psychic link with her, but Sersi later left Proctor. He used his link to Sersi to drive her insane and lead her to destroy their reality before killing her. He then set out on a [[multiverse|multiversal]] quest to kill every universe's Sersi. ==Behind the Scenes== *According to [[Jeremy Slater]], there were discussions about including [[Kit Harington]] reprising his role as Dane Whitman in ''[[Moon Knight (TV series)|Moon Knight]]'' due to his role as a [[Natural History Museum]] historian opening the possibility of him meeting [[Moon Knight|Steven Grant]], with the possibility of having Whitman adopt his Black Knight title from the comic books, but the idea was dropped because the writers felt there wasn't enough time to include Whitman in the [[The Goldfish Problem|first two]] [[Summon the Suit|episodes]] to justify integrating Black Knight in the storyline.[https://comicbook.com/marvel/news/moon-knight-writer-confirms-dane-whitman-black-knight-kit-harington-was-almost-in-series/ Moon Knight Writer Confirms Dane Whitman Was Almost in Series] ==References== {{Gallery|Dane Whitman/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{Marvel|Black Knight}} *{{WP|Black Knight (comics)|Black Knight}} *{{WP|Black Knight (Dane Whitman)|Dane Whitman}} [[es:Dane Whitman]] [[pt-br:Dane Whitman]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Eternals (film) Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Professors]] [[Category:Multilingual Characters]]
